page_content:
SPAN - Spanish

SPAN401 Advanced Composition | (3 Credits)

Compositions and essays with emphasis on stylistics, idiomatic and syntactic structures. Organization and writing of research papers. Prerequisite: SPAN302; or permission of ARHU-School of Languages, Literatures, and Cultures department.

SPAN402 Advanced Composition II (3 Credits)

Compositions and essays with emphasis on stylistics, idiomatic and syntactic structures. Organization and writing of research papers. Prerequisite: SPAN401; or permission of ARHU-School of Languages, Literatures, and Cultures department.
